channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Statin use after breast cancer diagnosis linked to better survival in hormone receptor-positive early breast cancer
item.description: 1. Prediagnostic statin use did not improve survival in early breast cancer patients. 2. Postdiagnostic statin use was associated with...

item.title: 11 Natural Ways to Reduce Your Cortisol Levels
Seladelpar (Livdelzi) sets new standard for primary biliary cholangitis treatment
item.description: 1. Gilead announced positive phase 3 IDEAL results for seladelpar (Livdelzi) in primary biliary cholangitis patients with persistent alkaline phos...

item.title: Common Walking Mistakes and How to Correct Them
item.description: Walking is an excellent low-impact exercise, but improper shoes, pace, or routine can hinder progress and potentially cause injury...
